title: Advanced Architectures Path
description: Build fluency in Advanced Architectures inside Reinforcement Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Sensor Fusion
steps.summary: Sensor Fusion belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Advanced Architectures. Compare it with Tactile Grasping and Organizational AI Architectures. It opens into Sensor Fusion Agent and AI in Sensor Fusion.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
